title: Harden Azure Entra authentication validation in the gateway
description: Strengthen the Azure authentication flow so Entra tokens are validated more securely instead of being accepted on trust alone.
acceptanceCriteria: The gateway validates the Azure identity token according to the expected security model
The implementation preserves the existing login flow and tenant derivation behavior
The change is covered by tests or validation steps
notes: The researcher identified that the current backend does not cryptographically validate the Entra token.
This is a production-hardening task and should be prioritized after the core deployment path is stable.
